title: UK Drills 6 x Flat Bit Set, 10/12/16/18/20/25mm, Wood Fully Hardened Woodworking, Flat Wood Spade Bits Compatible with Bosch Dewalt Makita Milwaukee and Others
features: FLAT DRILL - This high performance drill bit features a sharp, central tip to be used on wood, this helps maintain straight & fast drilling in timber or wood
HEX SHANK - The hexagonal shank design allows firm grip, ideal for professionals and DIY projects
FULLY HARDENED - This quality drill bit is ideal to be used for cutting plywood, hard and soft woods, it’s the perfect addition to your tool set
TO BE USED WITH - When fixed to a electric or hand drill, wood drill bits provides smooth, high-speed drilling through all kinds of wood & wood-like material, reducing the risk of splintering
ABOUT US - We pride ourselves in providing the best quality drill bits for over 30+ years. From drilling wood & tiles to masonry, we're happy to be your professional choice!
description: Product Description IDEAL FOR PROFESSIONALS All of our drill bits are designed with a firm grip, ideal for professionals such as blacksmiths and woodcutters, but also perfect for DIY projects due to them being easy to attach! FULLY HARDENED All of our high-quality drill bit is ideal to be used for cutting plywood, hard and softwoods, making it the perfect addition to your toolset! OVER 30 YEARS EXPERIENCE We pride ourselves in providing the best quality drill bits for over 30+ years. From drilling wood & tiles to masonry, we're happy to be your professional choice!
